# checks.linting.LintingCheck { #pycmdcheck.checks.linting.LintingCheck }

```python
checks.linting.LintingCheck()
```

Run linting tools on the package.

Executes a configurable linting tool to check code quality and
style. Supports ruff (default), flake8, and pylint.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**name**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The check identifier ("linting").

<code>[**description**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Human-readable description of this check.

<code>[**SUPPORTED_TOOLS**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   List of supported linting tools.

## Configuration Options {.doc-section .doc-section-configuration-options}

tool (str): Linter to use ("ruff", "flake8", or "pylint").
    Defaults to "ruff".
args (list[str]): Additional arguments to pass to the linter.

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

Run linting with default settings (ruff):

```python
>>> from pathlib import Path
>>> check = LintingCheck()
>>> result = check.run(Path("."), {"enabled": True})
>>> result.name
'linting'
```

Configure to use flake8:

```python
>>> config = {"enabled": True, "tool": "flake8"}
>>> result = check.run(Path("."), config)
```

Pass additional ruff arguments:

```python
>>> config = {"enabled": True, "args": ["--select", "E,W"]}
>>> result = check.run(Path("."), config)
```

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [run](#pycmdcheck.checks.linting.LintingCheck.run) | Run linting check on the package. |

### run { #pycmdcheck.checks.linting.LintingCheck.run }

```python
checks.linting.LintingCheck.run(package_path, config)
```

Run linting check on the package.

Executes the configured linting tool and collects any issues found.
Issues are reported in the result details (limited to first 10).

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**package_path**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[Path](`pathlib.Path`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Path to the package directory to lint.

<code>[**config**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[str](`str`), [Any](`typing.Any`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Configuration dictionary with options:  - tool (str): "ruff", "flake8", or "pylint" (default: "ruff") - args (list[str]): Additional arguments for the linter

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[CheckResult](`pycmdcheck.results.CheckResult`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   A CheckResult with:

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[CheckResult](`pycmdcheck.results.CheckResult`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   - OK status if no linting issues found

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[CheckResult](`pycmdcheck.results.CheckResult`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   - WARNING status if linting issues found

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[CheckResult](`pycmdcheck.results.CheckResult`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   - ERROR status if linter fails or unsupported tool specified

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[CheckResult](`pycmdcheck.results.CheckResult`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   - SKIPPED status if the linting tool is not installed
